testcase.name: test_store_settings_get
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration47_features.py:69: in test_store_settings_get assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 403: {"detail":"هذا الإجراء متاح فقط لمشتركي المنصة"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_store_settings_put
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration47_features.py:86: in test_store_settings_put assert get_response.status_code == 200 E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
